evidence.snippet: At Iberia Compositech we are experts in engineering and manufacturing of composite materials.

Our commitment extends to demanding markets such as the **automotive, aeronautics, nautical, industrial and medical** sectors. We master the diversity of composites, specializing in parts made of carbon fibers, glass fiber and aramid fiber.

items.notes: Manufactures composite parts from carbon fibre, glass fibre, and aramid fibre for aerospace, defence, automotive, naval and other sectors using prepreg, infusion, and RTM processes.

products_categories.notes: Primary business is composite materials engineering and manufacturing. Serves defence/aeronautics sectors and actively markets to the drone industry via blog content and eVTOL tag, but no drone-specific structural component product line is named.

value.address: Poligono La Charluca G-7 Nave 2 L4 50300, Calatayud, Zaragoza

evidence.snippet: *   [Poligono La Charluca G-7 Nave 2 L4 50300 - Calatayud, Zaragoza (España)](https://maps.app.goo.gl/WtXMj6D3ZkzEzSdX6)

Carbon fibre has emerged as a key material in the manufacture of military drones, due to its many advantages:
– Extreme light weight
– High strength
– Improved manoeuvrability
– Reduced detectability
These characteristics make carbon fibre an ideal material for military drones, improving not only their performance but also their survivability in hostile environments.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Makes composite parts (carbon fibre, Kevlar, glass fibre) serving aerospace/defence sectors. Blog category 'Drone industry' and eVTOL tag show active marketing to drone manufacturers. No confirmed named drone-specific component product line, hence medium confidence.

Prototype Manufacturing and 3D Printing Services
------------------------------------------------
At Iberia Compositech, we transform ideas into **high-performance solutions** through expert product development, consulting, prototype manufacturing, and 3D printing.

items.name: Composite Parts Manufacturing

products.notes: No catalog product SKUs; offerings are custom engineering and manufacturing services. Skipped pages (aeronautics, defence sector pages) may show specific part types.

evidence.snippet: From our state-of-the-art autoclave facility to our in-house training programs, we don’t just manufacture parts, **we shape the future of composite materials**.

At IBERIA COMPOSITECH, we operate under a quality management system certified according to **EN 9100:2018** and **ISO 9001:2015**, ensuring full traceability, strict process control, and continuous improvement throughout all stages of production. EN **9100:2018** is the aerospace industry-specific standard, internationally recognized for its high requirements in safety, reliability, and quality.

readiness.notes: Operates an autoclave facility, EN 9100:2018 and ISO 9001:2015 certified, with multiple production-grade processes (prepreg, infusion, RTM). Also offers prototyping and consulting as a secondary mode.

tagline: Spanish-based contract manufacturer of composite structures and parts using prepreg, infusion, and RTM processes. Serves aerospace, defence, and naval sectors alongside automotive and industrial markets.
